use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Pair with the LLM system-prompt stanza to ensure the chain planner knows how to call this tool.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/tool && python3 tool.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/tool && python3 tool.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/tool && python3 tool.py --help`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Wi-Fi and Wireless Security category.
documentation.why_to_use: Use when its cataloged capabilities match the chain planner need (tags: offensive, web, kfiosa, indexed, polymorphic).
